description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, rusted exterior and visible rivets along the upper band. The barrel is marked with a prominent yellow and black radioactive warning symbol on its side, indicating hazardous contents. The top surface features a yellow caution label with text, further emphasizing its dangerous nature. The upper rim of the barrel is reinforced with a blue-gray metallic band, adding structural strength. The surface texture is rough and aged, with patches of corrosion and discoloration. This type of barrel is typically used for storing or transporting hazardous or radioactive materials in industrial or restricted urban environments.
description: A large, rusted metal barrel with radioactive warning symbols and a reinforced blue-gray band, used for hazardous material storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radioactive warning symbol and the yellow caution label on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the radioactive symbol partially visible and the caution label on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear side view with the radioactive symbol mostly out of sight and the reinforced band visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing two radioactive symbols and the caution label on top.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning symbols, yellow caution label with text
